trends.headline: Rhode's peptide glazing serum powers the 'glazed skin' look BeautyTok is chasing this summer
trends.body: Hailey Bieber's lightweight peptide serum is making waves for its lit-from-within, glazed-donut finish that reads perfectly on camera. Beauty creators can film a 'glazed skin in 4 products' GRWM, a Rhode vs. budget-dupe comparison, and a 'does it glaze over SPF?' summer layering test.

metadata.context: Celebrity-brand serum anchoring the glazed-skin summer aesthetic

trends.headline: Cooling 'climate-adaptive' skincare spikes as heatwave-proof routines take over BeautyTok
trends.body: Products that react to skin temperature — cooling facial mists, anti-redness creams, fridge-chilled tools — are surging, with cooling-skincare searches topping 6,000 a month. Beauty creators can film a 'heatwave skincare routine,' a 'skincare fridge restock' ASMR, and a cooling-mist blind test ranking.

metadata.context: Heat-driven product category fueling routine and restock content

trends.headline: #PerfumeTok keeps perfume at No.1 on TikTok Shop as fragrance-layering content booms
trends.body: Perfume is currently TikTok's top-selling product category with #PerfumeTok past 600K posts, and layering tutorials are the format converting hardest. Beauty creators can film a 'scent layering for summer' tutorial, a 'guess the dupe' blind smell test, and a 'signature scent by vibe' recommendation series.

metadata.context: Top-GMV category on TikTok Shop; layering and dupe formats lead

trends.headline: Maximalist layering is the FashionTok formula of the moment: tees over collared shirts, sheers under structure
trends.body: Creators are stacking graphic tees over button-downs, sheer blouses under jackets, and tanks over longer shirts in a 'more is more' styling wave credited to 90s sitcom nostalgia. Fashion creators can film a 'one shirt, five layered looks' reel, a thrift haul styled maximalist, and a 'layering in summer without melting' guide.

metadata.context: Styling format dominating outfit content; low-cost, thrift-friendly

trends.headline: Yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's high-protein dessert of the moment
trends.body: The three-ingredient riff — thick yogurt, Biscoff cookies and coffee — has become this season's breakout 'healthier dessert' recipe alongside the wider yogurt-dessert wave. Food creators can film a '3-ingredient yogurt tiramisu' tutorial, a protein-swap taste test against the classic, and a macro-friendly dessert week series.

metadata.context: Viral recipe; simple ingredients, photogenic results, protein angle

trends.headline: Cloud matcha is the drink to film right now: coconut base topped with whipped matcha foam
trends.body: The latest matcha riff tops coconut water or milk with a whipped matcha-cream 'cloud,' joining coconut iced coffee in 2026's tropical-drinks wave. Beverage creators can film a 'cloud matcha at home' tutorial, a coconut iced coffee vs. cloud matcha taste-off, and a 'rating viral matcha drinks' series.

metadata.context: Summer drink trend; matcha demand so high it's straining supply

trends.headline: The 12-3-30 treadmill walk resurges as summer's low-barrier 'walking era' workout
trends.body: The 12% incline, 3 mph, 30-minute treadmill format is back on FitTok as creators package it into summer 'walking era' challenges and results diaries. Fitness creators can film a '30 days of 12-3-30' transformation, a 'walking era starter pack' explainer, and a heart-rate comparison vs. running.

metadata.context: Beginner-friendly cardio format ideal for challenge and results content

trends.headline: Wax melting lamps are HomeTok's new cozy-tech obsession
trends.body: The flame-free wax warmer lamp is redefining at-home aromatherapy content, pairing soft lighting with scent-driven 'reset my space' videos. Home creators can film a 'wax lamp unboxing and first melt,' a 'candle vs. wax lamp' comparison, and an evening-reset routine featuring the warm glow.

metadata.context: Viral TikTok Shop home gadget driving cozy-aesthetic content

trends.headline: The 'bubble bath wand' is TikTok Shop's everyday-luxury bathroom hit, with buyers grabbing two at a time
trends.body: The pink handheld wand that whips any tub into a five-star bubble bath in seconds is the latest 'TikTok made me buy it' bathroom upgrade. Home and lifestyle creators can film a 'hotel bath at home' transformation, a self-care Sunday reset featuring the wand, and a 'viral bath gadgets: worth it?' test.

metadata.context: Affordable-luxury bath gadget riding the self-care reset format

trends.headline: Mini walking treadmills stay TechTok's most reviewable WFH gadget as summer step-count content rises
trends.body: Under-desk walking pads keep pulling massive review and 'steps at home' content, sitting at the tech-meets-wellness sweet spot. Tech creators can film a '30 days of walking-pad WFH' results video, a budget vs. premium pad comparison, and a desk-setup integration tour.

metadata.context: Evergreen viral gadget with fresh summer step-challenge angle

trends.headline: Nuby's Rapid Cool milk cooler rides ParentTok testimonials as the summer must-pack baby gadget
trends.body: Real-parent testimonial videos are pushing the bottle-cooling gadget — alongside the Honey Bear straw cup — into viral registry-list content. Parenting creators can film a 'what's actually in my diaper bag this summer' rundown, a Rapid Cool real-time demo on an outing, and a 'viral baby products: worth it?' test.

metadata.context: Testimonial-driven baby gear wave; strong worth-it review format

trends.headline: Cat POV cameras hit 25M+ views as PetTok's most bingeable new format
trends.body: Collar-mounted POV cameras following cats on their daily adventures are pulling 25M+ views per video, led by accounts like @ivartheblindcat. Pet creators can film a 'day in my cat's life POV,' a 'what my dog does when I leave' reveal, and a POV-camera setup-and-review for pet parents.

metadata.context: POV pet-camera format with built-in gadget review tie-in

trends.headline: Hidden-gem island content shifts TravelTok to Siargao, Coron and the Ha Giang Loop
trends.body: Creators posting lesser-known Southeast Asia spots — Philippine islands, Laos, Vietnam's Ha Giang Loop — are out-engaging overexposed destination content this summer. Travel creators can film a 'why I skipped Bali for Siargao' explainer, a cost-per-day budget breakdown, and a hook-first 'this beach has no crowds' reveal.

metadata.context: Under-the-radar destination wave rewarding hook-first edits

trends.headline: Mermaidcore washes over JewelryTok as shells, pearls and sea-glass tones set the summer palette
trends.body: The coastal 'mermaidcore' aesthetic — shell pendants, baroque pearls, sea-glass blues and wavy metalwork — is the styling story dominating summer jewelry content. Jewelry creators can film a 'mermaidcore jewelry edit' styling reel, a 'beach finds to jewelry' DIY, and a high-low version of the look from market stalls to fine pieces.

metadata.context: Seasonal aesthetic driving styling edits and beachy DIY content
